text:
- [escalation] Sir Richard: Father responding positively to a previous email about an new Acer laptop.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub workflow failure for Jeeves Weekly Audit Health Report.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub workflow failure for Jeeves Daily Pipeline with unsuccessful jobs.
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Jeeves pipeline alert for permanent failure with 429 rate limit error in Daily Pipeline.
- [decision required] Google AI Studio: Google AI Studio requires action to secure Gemini API access by June 19, 2026.
- [scheduling] reminders@drchrono.com: Appointment reminder for Monty Owens on Monday, June 22, 2026 at 10:30 AM PDT.
- [no action] lang.mc+cc@gmail.com: Daily brief newsletter with a reminder to restrict an unrestricted Gemini API key.
- [no action] "Superhuman – Zain Kahn": Marketing newsletter from Superhuman about a YC-backed video editing startup.
- [no action] Michael Lang: Automated daily correspondence summary from Jeeves system.
- [no action] "info@schooljobs.com": Automated job interest notification from Seattle Public Schools.
- [no action] Google: Security alert about Microsoft Copilot being granted access to Google Account data.
- [no action] Google: Security alert about Microsoft Copilot being granted access to Google Account data.
